channel.title: Workshops on Andy Ibanez
channel.description: Recent content in Workshops on Andy Ibanez

item.title: try! Swift World: An Overview of the Modern Concurrency Features Introduced in Swift 5.5
item.description: Workshop Description Swift 5.5 introduced an exciting new set of concurrency APIs. Starting with async/await, the language has received a set of features that allow us to write shorter, concise, and more obvious concurrent code. You will learn how the new concurrency APIs help us avoid “pyramids of doom” with async/await, how structured concurrency is cooperative and how to apply it in the world; how unstructured concurrency gives us more control without sacrificing code readability; how to transform callback and even delegate based code into async/await, and how actors isolate their own state to make them usable across concurrent code.
